details.test: Task 1: Add highest-rated post-2020 climate policy paperback under $25 to cart
Task 2: Create reading list with 3 books under $30 and rating >= 4.0
Task 3: Register for virtual event within next 60 days at evening time slot
Task 4: Select longer book under $35 from first two results and add to cart
Task 5: Contact author about voting rights book under $20
Task 6: Subscribe to weekly election coverage newsletter with at least two topics
Task 7: Post 5-star review on a bestselling book under $30
Task 8: Bookmark and copy link of recent free speech article published within last 30 days
Task 9: Assemble mixed-format bundle under $50 and apply promo code DEBATE10
